name: Astral Projection
description: The psychic frees his astral body from his physical form. A silver cord links astral and physical selves; severing it is likely fatal (only a 30% chance the astral self can locate the physical body without it). The physical body falls into a helpless coma-like trance. The astral form can coexist in the material world (ghostly, visible to psychics, children under 13, animals, and most supernatural beings) or enter the astral plane. The material-world astral form can float, fly, see the invisible, pass through solid objects, and is impervious to physical harm, but cannot speak, smell, or touch the material plane except via telepathy or empathy. The astral body and silver cord each have Astral S.D.C. equal to twice the combined physical H.P. and S.D.C. of the psychic; the cord is -6 to strike. Magic and psychic influence affect the astral body fully. Traveling in the astral plane distorts time and space, requiring percentile rolls to successfully return to the physical body.

entries.effect: Fairly certain of location; on the right track (roll again).
Definitely certain of location. (Whew! Made it Back).

spawnedPresence.name: Astral Body and Silver Cord
spawnedPresence.derivedHealth: Twice the combined physical H.P. and S.D.C. of the psychic.

name: Clairvoyance
description: Allows the psychic to see or feel glimpses of the possible future through meditation or intense concentration. The psychic thinks about a particular person, event or place to receive these brief snippets of insight, like a snippet of film or a dream. It is unpredictable and requires a base skill roll to work. A failed roll means no insight, but I.S.P. and time are still consumed. Can be attempted twice a day. Add +5% to the base skill if the person involved is a friend or loved one. Sometimes, an image will occur unintentionally as a dream or nightmare.

range.summary: Self (although the image could pertain to people or places thousands of miles away).

lengthOfTrance.summary: 2D4 melees of concentration or meditation before the image occurs.

name: Death Trance
description: A state of mind over matter that slows the metabolism to such a degree that it creates a temporary state of suspended animation, simulating death. Without hospital facilities, even a medical doctor is likely to believe the character is dead (1-89% likelihood). The effects of drugs, toxins and chemicals are slowed to a crawl, but will take full effect the instant the death trance is stopped. While in this state, the psychic cannot be roused or respond to any type of stimulation, including psychic probes, and is incapable of attacking or defending himself.

duration.summary: As long as the psychic senses he must feign death, up to a maximum of four days.

name: Divination
description: A precognitive ability to sense the future by reading random patterns from tools or items (e.g., tarot cards, sticks, tea leaves). It is less accurate and detailed than clairvoyance, providing only impressions rather than images or sounds. The diviner must select one or two specific focuses/objects needed for divination. The psychic can attempt to divine their own future (with a -10% skill penalty) or the future of one person at a time, who can ask up to 13 questions. A base skill roll is required for each question; failure means no answer can be given.

lengthOfTrance.summary: Meditate for at least 15 or 20 minutes.

name: Empathy
description: Makes the psychic aware of, or feel, the emotions of other people, animals and supernatural creatures. The strongest emotions are easiest to sense: hate, anger, terror, love. It can often be used to establish that somebody or something is nearby, but cannot pinpoint an invisible or hiding person/creature. It is especially helpful in recognizing and communicating with ghosts and other supernatural creatures, and can be used in a limited sense like a lie detector.

duration.summary: Two minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

save.summary: Standard; a save vs empathy means the psychic can not get a clear sense of the emotions of that particular person. Must roll to save once each melee. Mind block prevents emanations.

name: Empathic Transmission
description: Enables the psychic to instill a powerful emotion into another living creature (person, animal, or supernatural being). Each attack can only affect one creature at a time. The psychic can invoke Despair/Sorrow (50% chance of surrendering/leaving; -2 parry/dodge), Confusion (-3 strike/parry/dodge, loses initiative), Fear (-3 strike/parry/dodge, 66% chance to flee), Hate/Anger (60% chance to attack/betray; +1 strike, -1 parry/dodge), Love/Peacefulness (60% chance to reconsider actions/halt rampage), or Trust (believe everything the psychic says while influenced; +3 to save against life-threatening suggestions).

name: Meditation
description: A mental discipline allowing the character to achieve a deep relaxation, focus, or to gain insight into one's inner self and the universe by dwelling upon a single notion, mental object, or mantra. It is often required to use psychic and magic powers.

name: Mediumship/Clairsentience (Seance)
description: The psychic acts as a beacon to call out to haunting ghosts or other entities, and acts as a medium through which the entity can speak (temporary possession) or as the mediator. A seance chain is composed of a group of people holding hands to create a circle. The group can be 2 to a dozen people. Each person in the chain can temporarily contribute up to half of his/her P.P.E. Every P.P.E. point increases the base skill by +2%. Every P.P.E. point from a person opposed reduces the success by -2% (nega-psychics reduce by -4% per P.P.E.). The seance can be broken instantly at any time by letting go of hands, which dispels the entity.

baseSkill.label: Success ratio
baseSkill.notes: +2% for every P.P.E point that can be drawn on.

name: Mind Block
description: The ability to completely close or block oneself from all psychic/mental emanations. The character cannot sense anything, use psychic abilities, or be influenced by others. It prevents penetration of telepathy, empathy, hypnotic suggestion, and empathic transfer. Adds a bonus of +1 to save vs all psychic and mental attacks.

name: Object Read (Psychometry)
description: Enables the psychic sensitive to receive impressions and images from an object regarding its use, history and last owner. Impressions (general alignment, emotional state, general purpose) and Images (snippets of isolated past events and physical descriptions) require separate percentile rolls. The present can also be glimpsed for an additional 4 I.S.P., if an impression or image roll was successful. Once an object has been read it cannot be read again by the same psychic.

isp.notes: Glimpsing the present costs an additional 4 I.S.P.

baseSkill.label: Impressions
baseSkill.notes: Impressions: 56%+2% per level. Images: 48%+2% per level. Present: 38%+2% per level.

name: Presence Sense
description: A sixth sense which alerts the character to the presence of supernatural and magic creatures in the area. The ability cannot pinpoint the location, but will give the impression of whether it is near (within 50 feet/15.2 m) or far (beyond 90 feet/27.4 m), and a vague idea of how many presences there are. The psychic can also sense human presences, but with much less accuracy (more of a feeling of 'We are not alone').

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

name: See Aura
description: All things, organic and inorganic, have an aura. Seeing an aura will indicate the following: estimate general level of experience, the presence of magic, the presence of psychic abilities, high or low base P.P.E., the presence of a possessing entity, or the presence of an unusual human aberration (serious illness, non-human, or mutant). Cannot tell one's alignment.

range.summary: 60 feet (18.3 m) and must be visible.

save.summary: None, but a mind block will hide the presence of psychic abilities, the level of P.P.E., and possession by a supernatural force.

name: See The Invisible
description: The character can see forces, objects and creatures which can turn invisible or are naturally invisible. Even if the creatures have no form per se, the psychic will be able to discern the vaporous image or energy sphere which is the being. This includes ghosts, entities and the astral body.

duration.summary: 1 minute per each level of experience.

name: Sense Evil
description: A refined ability to feel the presence of supernatural evil. While a psychic automatically feels supernatural evil without spending I.S.P., using this power provides a clearer picture. It indicates the general number of supernatural evil presences, the intensity of the evil, and can pinpoint the general location (very near, near, or far). The character can track the source like a bloodhound. Evil emanations from human beings cannot be felt unless they have immediate evil intentions and possess psychic powers or are psychotic (and psychic humans can mask this with a mind block).

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience.

name: Sense Magic
description: The psychic can feel magic energy, tell whether it is near (within 20 feet/6.1 m) or far (up to 120 feet/36 m away) and follow the emanations to pinpoint their source. Invisible magical supernatural creatures or objects can only be traced to a general area. The psychic can also sense if an object has magic powers, if a person or item is enchanted/under a spell, when magic is being used in the area, and when a person is casting a spell.

name: Sixth Sense
description: Gives the psychic a precognitive flash of imminent danger to himself or somebody near him. The character will not know what the danger is, where it will come from, or who it is directed at, only that something life-threatening will happen within the next 60 seconds (4 melees). It is triggered automatically when life is in great peril; it cannot be called upon at will. If the character has no I.S.P., the power is temporarily inoperative. The flash provides combat bonuses for the initial melee when the attack occurs, and the character cannot be surprised from behind.

duration.summary: Until the danger passes or happens.

name: Speed Reading
description: The ability to read and comprehend the written word extremely quickly. Speed of reading is 30 pages per minute/4 melees, retaining information normally. Highly technical texts will reduce the speed reading by half (15 pages per minute) and may require two readings.

name: Suggestion (Hypnosis)
description: A psychically boosted form of simple hypnosis. It is limited to relaxing/calming somebody down, putting a person or animal in a light sleep, helping a person to relax and focus on a thought, and implanting subtle ideas. The suggestion must be subtly worked into a comment and kept simple and clear. It can also be used to make the victim imagine sounds and images. It cannot make someone act against their nature or become a zombie slave. A successful save means the idea is not implanted, but the psychic may try again.

isp.notes: 4 I.S.P. per idea or implant attempt (p. 84).

genrePlacements.notes: Identical to Sensitive Suggestion; 10 ft range, one melee preparatory meditation.

isp.notes: Cost is per idea or attempt to implant an idea.

duration.summary: Varies with each circumstance and subject; rarely more than a few hours maximum.

name: Telepathy
description: Allows the psychic to eavesdrop on what a person is thinking at a particular moment by focusing on them and picking up surface thoughts. A deep probe into memory is not possible. The psychic can only read one person at a time. Limited telepathic communication is possible, sending a brief, directed thought message to one person at a time. Two-way telepathic communication is only possible between two telepathic psychics.

range.summary: Read surface thoughts up to 60 feet/18.3 m away or two-way telepathic communication - 140 feet/32.7 m.

save.summary: Conditional. When a person suspects that he is being telepathically probed he can resist, getting the standard saving throw. Mind blocks completely prevent probes or communications.

name: Total Recall
description: The character remembers every word he reads. Specific blocks of information can be recalled in perfect detail at will. If all I.S.P. have been expended the memory is a little fuzzy, so exact quotes and details may be impossible to recall, requiring a percentile roll to determine clarity.

isp.notes: Each block of information costs 3 I.S.P. to recall in absolute detail.

resolutionTable.label: Recall clarity when I.S.P. is exhausted

entries.effect: Remembered in full detail, word for word.
Details are forgotten, but the full essence of the ideas are clear.
Can only recall the most basic concepts; no details nor strong comprehension.

name: Alter Aura
description: A truly unique power that many psychic investigators claim is impossible and does not exist. Only a handful of physical psychics can manipulate their physical energy in such a way that it changes their aura. The altered aura will send the wrong message to those who can see auras. Alterations include: General level of experience can be made to seem much lower (level 1 or 2) or much higher (2D4 levels higher) than it really is; Conceal the presence of psychic powers; Conceal level of base P.P.E. (made to seem much lower); Conceal the presence of magic.

duration.summary: One hour per each level of experience.

name: Bio-Manipulation (the evil eye)
description: The psychic is able to induce physical trauma to the nervous system of others by sheer force of will and psychic energy. Intended victims must be within line of vision or their exact location known to the psychic. Each affects only one person per attack and can be used in any combination.

isp.notes: Cost is per each individual effect inflicted. The duration can be extended 4-16 (4D4) minutes per additional 6 I.S.P.

save.summary: Standard; if a character successfully saves against the attack he is not affected at all.

subAbilities.name: Blind
subAbilities.description: Temporarily knocks out the victim's optic nerves.

subAbilities.name: Deafness
subAbilities.description: Can be caused by manipulating the eardrum. Victims cannot hear anything.

combatModifiers.notes: -6 to parry or dodge attacks from behind.

subAbilities.name: Mute
subAbilities.description: Impairs the victim's vocal cords, making speech impossible.

combatModifiers.notes: Penalties only apply for the first melee due to shock/panic.

subAbilities.name: Pain
subAbilities.description: By manipulating the nerve centers, the psionic can induce terrible pain, shooting throughout the body.

subAbilities.name: Paralysis
subAbilities.description: Immobilizes the motor part of the brain, causing legs and arms to stop functioning.

subAbilities.name: Stun
subAbilities.description: This attack disorients and confuses its victims.

subAbilities.name: Tissue Manipulation
subAbilities.description: Irritates nerve fibers causing itching or temperature fluctuations.

name: Death Trance
description: A state of mind over matter that slows the metabolism to such a degree that it creates a temporary state of suspended animation, simulating death. Without hospital facilities, even a medical doctor is likely to believe the character is dead (1-89% likelihood). The effects of drugs, toxins and chemicals are slowed to a crawl, doing no damage or effect, but will take full effect the instant the death trance is stopped (unless treatment is administered first). While in the death-like state, the psychic can not be roused or respond to any type of stimulation, including psychic probes. This means he is incapable of attacking or defending himself in any way until the trance is broken.

isp.notes: It's easier for the physical psychic to control his body, because that's the focus of his powers.

duration.summary: As long as the psychic senses he must feign death, up to a maximum of four days.

name: Ectoplasm
description: This mystifying ability enables the psychic to create a slightly luminous, vapor-like substance that is extruded from the pores. Ectoplasm has two forms: an invisible vapor and a luminous, solid state. The vapor is a sort of floating, probing finger that can snuff out candles, open doors, knock over or pick up small objects (weighing under 9 ounces/255 grams), tap somebody on the shoulder, rustle leaves and knock on a door. The vapor can not go through solid objects, it can slip through keyholes, cracks under doors or loose seals around a window. The solid state of ectoplasm can be shaped into an extra limb, such as a hand or arm and hand, or tentacle or even a foot. The ectoplasmic limb appears as a white, slightly luminous appendage connected to a trail of ectoplasm stretching back to its creator like a lifeline of silly putty. The solid ectoplasmic limb has much greater strength; able to carry, lift or hold up to 40 lbs/18 kg. A vapor or solid appendage must be controlled by its creator at all times (except the automatic dodge); thus, it has a number of attacks/actions equal to its creator's. However, each attack/action by the ectoplasm counts as one of the character's attacks/actions that melee.

isp.notes: Vapor costs 6 I.S.P., Solid costs 12 I.S.P.

range.summary: 40 feet + 5 feet per level of experience (12.2 + 1.5 m).

duration.summary: 4 minutes (16 melees) per level of experience.

spawnedPresence.name: Ectoplasm Appendage
spawnedPresence.derivedHealth: Astral S.D.C. is 40 plus one hit point. If destroyed, the creator takes 1 hit point and 10 S.D.C. of physical damage.

combatModifiers.notes: Gets an automatic dodge against all attacks. Attacks per melee equal to creator.

name: Electrokinesis
description: Electrokinesis is a psychic power that allows the psychic to exert amazing physical control over electricity.

subAbilities.name: Electrical Resistance
subAbilities.description: The psychic can manipulate his body so to become resistant to electricity. Up to 60,000 volts will inflict no damage or ill effect. Currents greater than 60,000 volts, including lightning and magic electricity, do half damage.

subAbilities.name: Electrical Discharge
subAbilities.description: The character can cause static electricity within a six foot (1.8m) area, as well as emit an electrical discharge by touch.

subAbilities.name: Manipulate Electrical Devices
subAbilities.description: Through focused thought, the psychic can enforce a limited control over electrical devices.

range.summary: 45 feet + 5 feet per level of experience.

subAbilities.name: Sense Electricity
subAbilities.description: The psychic can sense or feel electricity and pinpoint its exact location with fair expertise.

range.summary: 45 feet + 5 feet per level of experience.

name: Hydrokinesis
description: This ability enables the character to use psychic energy to sense and influence water.

subAbilities.name: Sense Chemical Impurities
subAbilities.description: The psychic can sense whether or not water is polluted/contains other substances.

baseSkill.label: Purity check
baseSkill.notes: To determine if pure/drinkable. 35% + 5% per level to identify general nature of pollutant.

subAbilities.name: Boil Water
subAbilities.description: The psychic can increase the temperature of water, raising it to boiling level within one minute.

range.summary: 8 feet + 2 feet per level of experience.

subAbilities.name: Water Spout
subAbilities.description: An ability that enables the psychic to control and hurl water.

damage.notes: Only if boiling water is hurled.

subAbilities.name: Sense Water
subAbilities.description: The character can sense the presence of any water exposed to the open air automatically.

name: Impervious to Cold
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to suffer absolutely no ill effects or discomfort from exposure to even extreme freezing conditions.

name: Impervious to Fire/Heat
description: Another mind over matter discipline enabling the psychic to endure intense heat, fire, boiling water, hot coals, and so on without suffering pain, damage or scarring. Magic fires inflict half damage.

name: Impervious to Poison/Toxin
description: The character can negate the full effects of poisons and toxic chemicals which he has ingested (eaten or drank) or introduced into the bloodstream, as long as he/she has advance knowledge of its deadly properties. A poison, toxin, or drug which has been unknowingly inflicted (and starting to take effect) can be negated too, but will do half damage or effect before it can be completely negated.

name: Levitation
description: Levitation is a limited form of telekinesis that can raise an object (or even a person) straight up into the air and suspend it there (hover). Small objects weighing two pounds (0.9 kg) or less are the easiest to levitate. Medium size objects weighing 3 to 20 pounds (1.4 to 9.1 kg) are more difficult, requiring greater concentration.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 6 I.S.P. plus 1 I.S.P. per additional 10 lbs.

name: Pyrokinesis
description: Pyrokinesis is a psychic power that gives a character the power to manipulate fire.

subAbilities.name: Fire Resistant
subAbilities.description: The psychic can endure great heat and fire with minimal ill effect. Damage is reduced by half. Magic fires do full damage.

subAbilities.name: Spontaneous Combustion
subAbilities.description: The ability to create a spark that will ignite combustible material.

subAbilities.name: Fuel Flame
subAbilities.description: The character can feed the fire with psychic energy, doubling it in size.

range.summary: 30 feet + 5 feet per level of experience.

subAbilities.name: Extinguish Flames
subAbilities.description: The power to instantly put out an area of fire.

range.summary: 30 feet + 5 feet per level of experience.

subAbilities.name: Create Flame
subAbilities.description: The incredible ability to create fire out of thin air.

range.summary: 30 feet + 2 feet per level of experience.

subAbilities.name: Sense Fire
subAbilities.description: The psychic can sense or feel the presence of fire and pinpoint its exact location.

range.summary: 100 feet + 5 feet per level of experience.

name: Resist Fatigue
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to engage in physical activity without suffering from exhaustion. Although fatigue is temporarily suspended, the psychic will feel extremely tired and may even collapse when the psi-power's time limit lapses.

duration.summary: 1 hour + 20 minutes per level of experience.

name: Resist Hunger
description: Another mind over matter discipline that subdues any feeling of hunger, allowing the character to function at full effectiveness without nourishment. It is important to point out that while the psi-power maintains full operations, the body is still suffering from malnutrition and starvation. Loses 3 lbs of weight per day.

name: Resist Thirst
description: This ability is identical to the resist hunger psi-power except it applies to the consumption of water. It does not negate the long-range damage from dehydration.

name: Summon Inner Strength
description: This psi-power enables the character to draw on his inner reserves of strength to ward off pain and fatigue. Every time the psychic calls upon his inner strength, the following bonuses apply: Add +10 S.D.C. Add +2 to save vs poison or toxins. Add +5% to save vs coma/death. Fatigue is temporarily forgotten and the character can function as if he was fully rested for the full duration of the summon inner strength power.

name: Telekinesis
description: Telekinesis is the ability to move objects without any other means than directed psychic energy. The character can make an object hop, fall, roll, rise into the air, suspend it there (hover) or make it fly across the room. In order to move an object by telekinesis, the item must be clearly visible, within the psychic's range and the point of focus. As usual, the psychic must concentrate on what he is doing; thus, each telekinetic feat counts as one of the character's physical attacks.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 8 I.S.P. for the first 20 lbs, plus 1 I.S.P. for each additional 10 lbs.

combatModifiers.notes: Physical/skill bonuses do not apply to telekinesis strikes/parries.

damage.notes: Small: 1D4 to 1D6. Medium: 2D4 to 3D6. Large: 4D6 + 1D6 per additional 20 lbs.

name: Deaden Pain [cite: 10]
description: The ability to deaden pain can be used as a painkiller which temporarily negates existing pain or as an anesthetic to be used for surgery. [cite: 13]

range.summary: Immediate proximity, touch or within 3 feet (0.9 m). [cite: 11]

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience. [cite: 11]

name: Exorcism [cite: 14]
description: The healer can perform a rite of exorcism that uses psychic energy to expel the loathsome being from its mortal, host body. [cite: 19] A completely successful exorcism will free the victim of the supernatural force that controls him and send it back to it's own non-earthly world. [cite: 20] A partially successful exorcism will drive the evil force out of the possessed person or animal, but does not send the damnable thing back to it's own dimension. [cite: 21] Thus, it can try to possess the healer or flee to wander the Earth in search of new victims. [cite: 22] During the exorcism, the possessing force can use whatever powers it may have, as well as physical attacks or any special psychic abilities of its host body. [cite: 31] Fortunately, the rite of exorcism weakens the creature, reducing its number of attacks per melee by half. [cite: 32]

range.summary: Immediate area, touch or within 8 feet (2.4 m). [cite: 15]

lengthOfTrance.summary: 30 minutes of preparation and 6D6 minutes with the possessed person or animal. [cite: 16]

baseSkill.label: Expulsion
baseSkill.notes: First, roll to see if the being has been expelled from its victim's body. [cite: 26] Success ratio: 28%+7% per each additional level of experience. [cite: 27] Second, roll to see if the thing is forced back into its own dimension. [cite: 27] Success Ratio: 21%+7% per each additional level of experience. [cite: 28] The chance of a successful exorcism on a nega-psychic is reduced by half, as is the success ratio for sending the being back to its own dimension. [cite: 29] The same is true of some of the more powerful supernatural beings. [cite: 30]

limitations.otherLimitations: Note: can only exorcise the living. [cite: 17] An exorcism can only be used on living persons or animals whose bodies are inhabited by a supernatural entity or creature. [cite: 23]

name: Healing Touch [cite: 37]
description: The healing touch is a remarkable healing ability that can instantly heal cuts, burns, bruises and similar physical wounds. [cite: 40]

healing.notes: The touch restores 1D8 hit points or 2D6 S.D.C. [cite: 41]

limitations.otherLimitations: The healing touch can only be used on other living creatures, never on himself. [cite: 41]

name: Impervious to Cold [cite: 42]
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to suffer absolutely no ill effects or discomfort from exposure to even extreme freezing conditions. [cite: 46]

name: Impervious to Fire [cite: 47]
description: Another mind over matter discipline enabling the psychic to endure intense heat, fire, boiling water, hot coals, and so on, without suffering pain, damage or scarring. [cite: 50] Magic fires inflict half damage. [cite: 51]

name: Increased Healing [cite: 52]
description: The healer is able to stimulate another person's healing energies, dramatically increasing one's recuperative powers. [cite: 56]

combatModifiers.notes: Hit points and S.D.C. recovery are double the normal professional treatment rate. [cite: 56, 57]

name: Induce Pain [cite: 58]
description: The ability to inflict a terrible, debilitating pain without physically damaging the living creature. [cite: 65] There is a good chance of the victim passing out after five minutes of continuous pain; [cite: 67] 50%+10% per each additional minute. [cite: 68]

duration.summary: As long as the trance is maintained. [cite: 59]

lengthOfTrance.summary: One melee/15 seconds is needed to prepare, before pain can be inflicted. [cite: 60] The length of the pain inducing trance is completely up to the psychic. [cite: 61]

combatModifiers.notes: Victims are -6 to strike, parry and dodge, lose initiative, skills are -30%, and attacks per melee are half. [cite: 66]

name: Induce Sleep [cite: 69]
description: This is not an offensive ability, but is intended to be a recuperative power to induce sleep on those who are ill, exhausted, or an insomniac. [cite: 73] The person will fall into a normal, restful sleep from which he can be easily roused. [cite: 74] Unwilling victims of the induce sleep psi-power get a +5 bonus to save (because this is not the intent of the ability) and can not be involved in combat at the time. [cite: 75]

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience (or until awakened). [cite: 71]

save.summary: Standard; plus unwilling victims are +5 to save vs psychic attack. [cite: 72]

name: Psychic Diagnosis [cite: 76]
description: The psychic healer can sense physical pain, damage, disease and possession with absolute clarity. [cite: 80] This pinpoint accuracy enables the character to suggest treatment or to conduct psychic surgery. [cite: 81]

save.summary: None; except for the nega-psychic, standard. [cite: 79]

name: Psychic Purification [cite: 82]
description: The healer can use his abilities to slow a person's metabolism and destroy chemicals, drugs, poisons, and toxins in the body. [cite: 86] The effects of the drugs/impurities are immediately halted at the beginning of the meditation, and completely destroyed/negated by its end. [cite: 87] Damage sustained prior to the psychic's intervention still exists. [cite: 88]

save.summary: None; except for the nega-psychic, standard. [cite: 86]

name: Psychic Surgery [cite: 89]
description: Psychic surgery is used to repair broken bones, internal injuries, the removal of foreign objects (bullets, etc.), or when a character has suffered so much damage that he or she has lapsed into a coma (zero or less hit points). [cite: 93] Note that there is absolutely no scarring from psychic surgery and minimal pain (no pain if the deaden pain psi-ability is used). [cite: 95] No tools are needed, only the psychic's hands. [cite: 96]

lengthOfTrance.summary: 2D6 minutes of preparatory meditation, plus the duration of the surgery (which is half the time of conventional modern medicine). [cite: 91]

entries.effect: The recovery from a coma (near death) is equal to treatment from a hospital, 1-66%, when psychic surgery is used. [cite: 94]

limitations.otherLimitations: Note: A psychic diagnosis must be made before surgery is possible. [cite: 96]

name: Resist Fatigue [cite: 97]
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to engage in physical activity without suffering from exhaustion. [cite: 100] Although fatigue is temporarily suspended, the psychic will feel extremely tired and may even collapse when the psi-power's time limit lapses. [cite: 101]

duration.summary: One hour plus 20 minutes per level of experience. [cite: 99]

name: Astral Transference
description: This powerful ability transforms the character's body into an astral construct, similar to an entity or other energy beings, and able to travel astrally. One might consider this power a sort of "super" astral projection. Unlike normal astral projection, the entire body of the character is transformed into an astral energy being, so the body is not left behind and the duration for astral travel is much greater. All the abilities and benefits of the astral projection power apply to this form as well, except there is no silver cord involved.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience

name: Bio-Regeneration (Superior)
description: Another bio-manipulation power that enables the psionic to direct his psychic energy to immediate self-healing. The character must concentrate for one full minute while his body instantly heals itself. 4D6 hit points and 4D6 S.D.C points are simultaneously restored at the end of 60 seconds. As usual, there is no scarring.

healing.notes: Simultaneously restored at the end of 60 seconds. No scarring.

name: Block Breaker
description: This power attacks a psychic's mind block in an attempt to temporarily lower the target's defenses. If the block breaker is successful, the character's mind block is removed for 1D4 melee rounds, during which time he or she cannot shield himself from psionic probes and other psionic influences. At the end of the duration, the victim may restore the block by spending I.S.P. normally. The attacker can raise the save difficulty by spending more I.S.P.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: +10 I.S.P. per -1 penalty inflicted to the defender's saving throw.

range.summary: 60 feet (18.3 m) plus 10 feet (3.0 m) per level of experience.

save.summary: Standard, but penalized by the attacker's spent I.S.P.

name: Dreamdance (Superior)
description: This power transforms the psychic's body into a dream creature, enabling the character to enter the Dreamstream body and soul. Doing this has its dangers, including the fact that the dream traveler is not able to escape the Dreamstream by waking up. While in the Dreamstream, the psychic can enter other people's Dream Pools, and use psionics or other abilities to affect the dreams of the dreamer. At the end of the power's duration, or whenever the character decides to return to the waking world, the Dream Dancer will reappear at the physical location he originally left.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

name: Gestalt Circle
description: The psionic character can link a group of psychics (one per level of experience, max 8) together and pool their powers. While linked in a gestalt circle, the group can only use those powers they have in common, but those powers can be manipulated at a level equal to their combined levels of experience. The combined number of I.S.P. is available to the group (use is divided equally), and the range of the psionic powers are increased by 20% per each psychic in the circle (if the range is not affected by level). One psychic is designated as the 'key' through which powers are directed. Breaking hands instantly shatters the circle.

isp.notes: Cost is 30 I.S.P. to initiate. Rebuilding a broken circle costs another 30 I.S.P.

range.summary: Touch; psychics must form a circle and hold hands.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum of 8 participants. Participants cannot perform other skills, physical combat, or parry without breaking the circle. Dodging without breaking ranks is at -5.

name: Group Mind Block
description: The master psionic can instantly erect a mental barrier or mind block to protect himself and those around him, within a 120 foot (36.5 m) area. The group mind block works just like the individual mind block power. Everyone within the area of effect will be automatically blocked, but the effect is not detectable so they are not likely to know they are being mind blocked.

name: Mind Block Auto-Defense
description: The moment the psychic is being mind probed, a personal mind block automatically snaps into place. It also alerts the psionic to the fact he or she is being probed or attacked by empathy or telepathy. The character must consciously and willingly lower the mind shield to open himself to psychic probes. Otherwise, the automatic defense mind block will stay in effect until the probe/attack is over.

isp.notes: The character must permanently give up 10 I.S.P. when this power is selected. Automatic activations cost 0 I.S.P.

duration.summary: Special; until the probe/attack is over.

name: Mind Bond
description: This creates an instant mind link between the psychic and the victim. When this happens, each will learn everything there is to know about the other. This includes all skills, secret identities, phobias, etc. In both cases, the memory is complete for only 3D4 hours; after that, the character must roll under 15% to recall any particular item. After one month, all memories completely disappear. Skills and skill bonuses are temporarily absorbed. Physical attributes and physical training bonuses are not gained. Bonding with alien or extremely disturbed minds can cause permanent insanity.

duration.summary: Special; full memory for 3D4 hours, fading completely over one month.

name: Mind Wipe
description: To mind wipe an intelligent creature, the psychic must make physical contact, touching his victim's temples to erase whatever he desires. This is done by verbal suggestion and can erase any past event, knowledge, skill, and so on. The process takes about three minutes to complete. The memory can be erased temporarily or permanently depending on the I.S.P. invested.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 50 I.S.P. and permanently sacrifice 4 M.E. points.

duration.summary: Special; 1D4 days per 10 I.S.P., or Permanent.

lengthOfTrance.summary: Takes about three minutes to complete.

name: P.P.E. Shield
description: A psionic defense that can be used to prevent P.P.E. vampires, mages and other entities from siphoning off one's psychic energy. The shield works similarly to a mind block, only it prevents others from draining one's P.P.E.

name: Possession
description: The psychic can completely take over and control another person. The psychic essence of the controlling mind is transferred into the body of another individual. While in the victim's body/mind, the psychic retains all his own knowledge and identity. He cannot read the mind of the person he now possesses, nor access any knowledge from the victim's memory. Only the physical body can be controlled, like a living robot. The victim goes into a trance state and remembers nothing. The psychic's natural body falls into a coma-like state.

name: Psi-Shield
description: A companion power to the psi-sword, in which the psychic can create an energy shield out of thin air. The shield can be used to parry all hand to hand attacks, but not against projectiles/bullets.

name: Psi-Sword
description: Psi-swords are psychic energy weapons that the character can mentally will into existence. The sword appears out of thin air as a shimmering blade of energy that resembles a glowing sword. Its appearance usually reflects its creator. Each weapon is equally powerful regardless of its form and size.

damage.notes: 6D6 at level 3. Adds 1D6 at levels 4, 7, 9, 12, and 15. Can be adjusted to inflict a minimum of 2D6.

name: Psychic Mirage (Superior)
description: A powerful illusion that affects all senses. The illusion will move and act out any mental commands given by its creator, and will fool the ears, sense of touch and pain centers of those who face it. Illusionary damage will not do any permanent damage, although people who think they have been killed will collapse into unconsciousness. This illusion can be created in most planes of existence.

range.summary: 120 feet (36.5 m); size of illusion is 3 feet (0.9 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

name: Supercharge
description: This power channels the character's psychic energies into his own body, temporarily granting him +6 to P.S., which becomes supernatural, and an additional 40 S.D.C. for the duration of the power. This power is especially handy when combating vampires and other superhuman monstrosities.

isp.notes: Cost is 40 I.S.P. in games where supernatural P.S. inflicts mega-damage (like Rifts).

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: P.S. becomes Supernatural for the duration.

name: Telekinetic Force Field
description: The psychic can instantly erect a force field around himself or others in the blink of an eye. If the creation of the force field is to parry an attack, the psionic must roll a successful parry to see if he was able to create the field before the attack struck. The force field can be made so that it only encircles its creator or as large as a 10 foot (3.0 m) area per level of experience. The field protects with 130 S.D.C., plus 20 S.D.C. per level of experience. The psychic can create additional force fields as I.S.P. allows.

range.summary: Self or 40 feet (12.2 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: Five minutes per level of experience.

spawnedPresence.name: Telekinetic Force Field
spawnedPresence.derivedHealth: 130 S.D.C., plus 20 S.D.C. per level of experience.

name: Telemechanics
description: This ability allows the psionic to mentally communicate with and understand machines. A bizarre combination of object read and telepathy, except that it applies to mechanical devices only. By touching any non-artificially intelligent machine, the psychic will instantly have a complete (although temporary) knowledge of exactly how the machine is operated, including schematics. When touching a computer, the psychic can actually communicate with it telepathically and tap into memory banks directly.

range.summary: Touch or up to 5 feet (1.5 m) away.

duration.summary: 10 minutes plus 2 minutes per level of experience.

baseSkill.label: Machine empathy
baseSkill.notes: Expertise is equal to 80% (88% for computers) and applies to all aspects of the machine, repair, access codes, etc.

name: Bio-Regeneration
description: This is the ability to mentally heal oneself of disease, poison, or physical damage. Unfortunately, this ability is limited to the healing of oneself and cannot help others. The process requires one full minute of concentration. Bio-Regeneration does not restore missing limbs. When cuts and scrapes are healed through bio-regeneration, there is NO scarring. The psionic can regenerate as often as once every other minute.

healing.notes: Restores per melee round, leaves no scars.

name: Detect Psionics
description: This is a mental probe that will indicate the presence of psionic energy within the immediate area. The probe cannot be used to pinpoint the exact location of psychic energy nor the level of power other than a vague sense of weak, medium or powerful. It will indicate whether an individual is psychic by directing the probe at a specific person. It will also indicate whether a group mind block is in effect and if a person is psionically possessed.

range.summary: Self, sensing range is 30 feet (9.1 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

name: Restore I.S.P.
description: The psychic doesn't actually restore lost I.S.P., but transfers some of his I.S.P. to another psychic. A mind block will prevent this energy transfer.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 2 I.S.P. plus the total amount of I.S.P. being transferred to the target.

name: Restore P.P.E.
description: This power allows the psychic to convert some of his I.S.P. to P.P.E. energy and transfer the energy to another person. Two I.S.P. counts as one P.P.E. point. A mind block will prevent this energy transfer.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 4 I.S.P. plus the amount of I.S.P. being converted (at a 2:1 ratio for P.P.E.).

name: Suppress Fear
description: This power temporarily suppresses the chemical and psychological components of fear in the subject. As a result, the character is unable to feel the emotion, even if intellectually he realizes he is in danger or is facing a terrifying situation. This enables the character to take perfectly rational actions rather than respond with 'fight or flight'. The character automatically succeeds on any check to resist horror factor, even if magically induced.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

name: Astral Bolts
description: This power can only be used in the Astral Plane, because it draws on ambient ectoplasm. The astral bolts inflict 1D4 S.D.C. per level of the caster, and are +3 to strike. Targets can dodge normally.

range.summary: 30 feet (9.1 m) plus 10 feet (3.0 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: One melee round per level of experience.

damage.notes: Only functions in the Astral Plane.

combatModifiers.notes: Bonus specifically applies to the Astral Bolt attacks.

name: Astral Navigation
description: Astral travelers with this power are in a state of communion with the Astral Plane, and are able to find their way more easily. This power can be used in many different ways, depending on where in the Astral Plane the user is at the moment. In the Outer Layer, the psychic can return to his body. In the Inner Plane, the psychic can travel through the Dragon Roads.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

baseSkill.label: Success ratio
baseSkill.notes: Skill rolls can be made once every hour. Greatly modified by familiarity with destination.

name: Dreamdance (Minor)
description: This psychic power allows the character to enter the Dreamstream. The psychic's body remains in a trance, much like when traveling via astral projection. A dream projection is similar to an astral projection but without the silver cord link. This dream projection has S.D.C. points equal to the total S.D.C. and hit points of the character. While in the Dreamstream, the character can search for the Dream Pool of any given individual who is asleep and dreaming.

entries.effect: Find Pool (Roll every minute): Intimately knows the person or feels great love/hatred.
Find Pool (Roll every five minutes): Knows the person.
Find Pool (Roll every ten minutes): Acquainted with the person.
Find Pool (Roll every half hour): Has seen the person at least once.
Find Pool (Roll every hour): Has heard of the person, or seen pictures (includes famous people).

spawnedPresence.name: Dream Projection
spawnedPresence.derivedHealth: Equal to the total S.D.C. and hit points of the character.

name: Ethereal Mirage (Minor)
description: Creates a visual illusion projected directly into the mind of the people in range of the power. If a successful save is made the target realizes he is seeing an illusion. The illusion can have any shape and form the character wishes it to have, but cannot produce any sound, nor is it substantial.

range.summary: 10 feet (3.0 m) per level of experience. Size of the illusion is limited to 3 square feet (0.28 square meter) per level of experience.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

limitations.otherLimitations: This power only works in the Dreamstream and Astral Plane.

name: Sense Dimensional Anomaly
description: This power will detect the presence of a dimensional anomaly like a dimensional portal or Rift leading to an astral or dream domain, as well as any disturbances caused by teleportation, temporal magic or other powers that disrupt the fabric of reality.

name: Activate Dimensional Portal
description: This power allows psychics to open some dimensional portals. The portal must already exist (the character cannot create a dimensional portal). A protected portal will resist being opened by interlopers.

duration.summary: One melee round per level of experience.

save.summary: None; protected portals will have a standard save, modified by any bonuses of its creator.

limitations.otherLimitations: Applicable only to dimensional portals to and from the Astral Plane, astral domains, astral kingdoms, Dream Pools, the Dreamstream and the Nightlands.

name: Telekinetic Punch
description: Deliver a powerful punch or kick-like force through telekinetic energy. Used in conjunction with a normal, physical attack that can be parried or dodged by the enemy. The I.S.P. is spent whether or not the punch or kick actually hits the target.

range.summary: By touch or one foot (0.3 m) per level of experience.

backlash.notes: Damage is from wrenched muscles or a dislocated joint from the extra strain on the body.

name: Telekinetic Leap
description: Boosts leaping ability, propelling the psychic via telekinetic force. Can be used in conjunction with a leap kick attack.

movement.leapHighBonus: +3 feet (0.9 m) per level of experience
movement.leapLongBonus: +5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience

damage.notes: Damage applies if used as a leap kick attack.

backlash.notes: Psychic takes 2D6 damage from the hard impact of a leap kick. An acrobatics, gymnastics, or roll with punch/fall/impact roll may be needed to land safely.
